description: Multiple sub-threshold cash transactions in 7-day window summing >= PHP 450k
Funds credited then debited within 48 hours net position < 10% of gross
Account inactive for 90+ days receives credit >= PHP 100000 in single transaction

description: Large cash deposit inconsistent with customer's historical transaction patterns
